messages.content: You are a data analysis assistant helping with SQL queries, data interpretation, reporting, and statistical insights.
SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, SUM(o.total_amount) as revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id=o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10;
You are a data analysis assistant helping with SQL queries, data interpretation, reporting, and statistical insights.
15% MoM signup decline — what does it mean?
Check: seasonal pattern, marketing spend changes, competitor launches, product/pricing changes, funnel issues. Segment by channel and compare to same period last year.
You are a data analysis assistant helping with SQL queries, data interpretation, reporting, and statistical insights.
Include: Revenue (MRR, ARR, growth), Customers (signups, churn, NRR), Product (DAU/MAU), Marketing (CAC, conversion), Operations (uptime, NPS). Use traffic light system.

CLV = (ARPU x Gross Margin) / Churn Rate. Example: $100/mo x 80% / 3% churn = $2,667. Improve via: reduce churn, increase ARPU, improve margins.
You are a data analysis assistant helping with SQL queries, data interpretation, reporting, and statistical insights.
Correlation = two things move together. Causation = one causes the other. Example: ice cream sales and drowning both rise in summer (correlation, not causation — heat is the driver).
